StructurePhase.Reference: Reehuis M., Danebrock M.E., Rodriguez Carvajal J., Jeitschko W., Stüsser N., Hoffmann R.D., J. Magn. Magn. Mater., v154 p355 (1996)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: AB2X2. LPF Collection Code: 311956. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:C graphite,Ho,Re. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. Sample annealed at 1173 K for 2 w in evacuated silica tube. Article Title: Antiferromagnetic order of the lanthanoid moments in the carbides Ln2ReC2 with Ln= Tb, Dy, Ho and Er. Temperature of Data Collection: 300 K. Wyckoff Sequence: c5. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
